title: Databricks Genie app for Slack (Public Preview) ​
body:
**June 9, 2026**

The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview. The app brings Genie into Slack so users can get answers to data questions without leaving Slack. Send a direct message to the app or mention `@Genie` in a channel or group DM, and answers route through Genie or a specific Genie Space that a channel owner has pinned. See [Databricks Genie app for Slack](/aws/en/genie-one/genie-slack).
